Bror, det var mer enn bare et menneske, det var Gud.

text:
It was true He was a man when He come off the mountain that night, He was so hungry, He looked all around the tree, He couldn't find nothing to eat and He cursed the tree, He was a man when He was hungry. But when He taken those five biscuits and two little, three little pieces of fishes and fed five thousand, that was more than a man! That was God in Him! Sure. Yes, sir.
He was a man when He was laying out there on that ship that night. It floated around, ten thousand devils of the sea swore they would drown Him. That little old ship bobbing up and down like a bottle stopper. The Devil says, "I got Him now, He's asleep laying there. He's so tired from healing the sick till He can't move."
He was a man when he was laying there asleep, that's true. But when He put His foot on the brail of the boat, looked up and said, "Peace, be still." That was more than a man, that was God speaking out of His Son. Hallelujah!
text_no:
Det er sant at Han var et menneske da Han kom ned fra fjellet den natten. Han var så sulten, Han så seg omkring på treet, men fant ingenting å spise og forbannet derfor treet. Han var et menneske da Han var sulten. Men da Han tok de fem brødene og de to små fiskene og mettet fem tusen, var det mer enn et menneske! Det var Gud i Ham! Ja, absolutt.
Han var et menneske da Han lå ute i båten den natten. Den fløt rundt mens titusenvis av havets djevler sverget å drukne Ham. Den lille båten duppet opp og ned som en flaskepropp. Djevelen sa: "Nå har jeg Ham. Han sover der, så utmattet etter å ha helbredet de syke at Han ikke kan røre seg."
Han var et menneske da Han lå der og sov, det er sant. Men da Han satte foten på båtens reling, så opp og sa: "Fred, vær stille," var det mer enn et menneske. Det var Gud som talte gjennom Sin Sønn. Halleluja!

text:
He was a man when He cried yonder at Calvary for mercy, when He was dying, but when He rose up on Easter morning, He broke the bonds of death and hell! That was more than a man, that was God in His Son. Believest thou this?
I believe that that same Jesus that was yesterday, is today and will be forever. Believest thou this? I believe a woman who couldn't get in the prayer line, touched the hem of His garment and was made every whit whole. Believest thou this?
I believe it's Jesus Christ that makes the blind to see, the deaf to hear, the dumb to speak. You believest thou this? I believe it's Jesus Christ the same yesterday, today, and forever. That gives these people the Holy Ghost and makes them scream and shout and carry on the way it is. You believe thou this? I believe the Holy Ghost is right here now. Believest thou this? I believe He's ready to heal everybody in the building. Believest thou this? I believe He's ready to fill every person with the baptism. Believest thou this? Hallelujah!
text_no:
Han var et menneske da Han ropte etter nåde på Golgata, da Han døde, men da Han sto opp påskemorgen, brøt Han dødens og helvetes lenker! Det var mer enn et menneske, det var Gud i Sin Sønn. Tror du dette?
Jeg tror at den samme Jesus, som var i går, er i dag og vil være for alltid. Tror du dette? Jeg tror at en kvinne som ikke kunne komme inn i bønnekøen, rørte ved kanten av Hans klær og ble fullstendig helbredet. Tror du dette?
Jeg tror at det er Jesus Kristus som får de blinde til å se, de døve til å høre og de stumme til å tale. Tror du dette? Jeg tror at det er den samme Jesus Kristus, i går, i dag og for alltid, som gir disse menneskene Den Hellige Ånd og får dem til å rope og juble. Tror du dette? Jeg tror Den Hellige Ånd er her akkurat nå. Tror du dette? Jeg tror Han er klar til å helbrede alle i bygningen. Tror du dette? Jeg tror Han er klar til å fylle hver person med dåpen. Tror du dette? Halleluja!

text:
I believe He's here right now, don't you believe that? Believest thou this? Let's stand to our feet and give Him praise right now. I believe you'll receive the baptism of the Holy Ghost. Believest thou this?
Our Heavenly Father, as You did last night, so be it tonight. May the power of the Holy Ghost fall over this building. God, take away doubts, fears and give the baptism of the Holy Ghost just now, grant it.
I believe He's here to fill every one of you. Believest thou this? I believe if you'll accept your healing, you can get out of the wheelchair. Believest thou this?
I believe if you'll accept your healing, you'll come off the cot. Believest thou this? I believe He's here to heal that cancer. Believest thou this?
text_no:
Jeg tror Han er her akkurat nå, tror du ikke det? Tror du dette? La oss reise oss opp og gi Ham ære akkurat nå. Jeg tror du vil motta dåpen i Den Hellige Ånd. Tror du dette?
Vår Himmelske Far, slik Du gjorde i går kveld, så vær det også i kveld. Må kraften av Den Hellige Ånd falle over dette bygget. Gud, fjern tvil og frykt, og gi dåpen i Den Hellige Ånd akkurat nå, gi det.
Jeg tror Han er her for å fylle hver og en av dere. Tror du dette? Jeg tror at hvis du aksepterer din helbredelse, kan du reise deg fra rullestolen. Tror du dette?
Jeg tror at hvis du aksepterer din helbredelse, kan du komme deg opp fra sengen. Tror du dette? Jeg tror Han er her for å helbrede den kreften. Tror du dette?
